key_finding: Interventions targeting maladaptive social cognition produced the largest effect sizes (d = 0.60 for RCTs) compared to social skills training, enhanced social support, or increased social interaction.
effect_notes: Effect size sign flipped to LILI convention (positive = beneficial). Original paper: d = -0.20 (random effects).

key_finding: Guided internet-delivered CBT produced a large reduction in loneliness vs. waitlist (d = 0.77); gains maintained at 4-month follow-up.
effect_notes: Pilot RCT; small sample; participants unblinded.
